description: Evaluation of organizational processes and systems to ensure adherence to standards, identify areas of improvement, and maintain compliance with legal and regulatory obligations.

useCases.displayName: Agentic AI vs Traditional AI vs RPA Comparator
useCases.description: Provides structured comparison across automation technologies with selection guidance and risk-benefit profile.
Designs swim lanes for agent orchestration, system triggers, human-in-loop checkpoints, and automation governance layers.
Generation of a draft internal audit report from information contained in documents.
Evaluates automation use cases and provides implementation roadmap including tools, integrations, and governance.
Delivers financial analysis including payback period, NPV, ROI, and risk-adjusted savings from transformation.
Develops swim lane charts documenting handoffs, roles, SLA ownership, and approvals across teams.
Helps efficiently extracting information based on bonus-related documentation.
Verification that documents comply with internal policies and regulations, identifying potential discrepancies and risks.
Creates detailed task-level process maps with decision nodes, system touchpoints, data flow, and technical specs (BPMN aligned).
Calculates FTE savings, redeployment potential, productivity uplift, and workforce transition scenarios.
Creates forward-looking process maps visualizing digital agents, human-AI collaboration, and future-state automation maturity.
Designs long-term process strategy with continuous improvement loops and emerging tech adoption roadmap.
Identifies manual, semi-automated, and automated steps with feasibility and impact scoring.
Provides eagle-eye strategic process maps linking activities to business outcomes and KPIs.
Analyzes decision density, exception rates, system dependencies, and assigns Low/Medium/High risk levels.
Assesses re-engineering potential, identifies bottlenecks, and delivers transformation recommendations with quantified impact.
Identifies enterprise system optimization and integration opportunities with impact-benefit analysis.

description: Evaluation of organizational processes and systems to ensure adherence to standards, identify areas of improvement, and maintain compliance with legal and regulatory obligations.

useCases.displayName: DB or Swagger File Code Generation
useCases.description: Create new functions or modules using contextual information from Swagger or databases. This accelerates development by ensuring consistency with existing structures and reducing manual coding effort.

Make HTTP requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) to interact with APIs, fetch remote data, or trigger processes. This involves handling authentication, request headers, payloads, and error management for robust communication.

Execute complex SQL/noSQL queries to extract data for detailed reports. This involves filtering, sorting, joining multiple tables, and aggregating data efficiently, supporting data-driven decision-making processes.

Perform bulk data insertions or updates, often required for reflecting processing outcomes or applying mass corrections. This includes transaction management, data integrity checks, and error handling for reliable updates.
[Agent Tool] Generates and executes SQL queries from natural language.

Establish SSH connections to remote servers, primarily to retrieve log files or execute maintenance scripts. This includes authentication (key or password), command execution, and secure data transfer protocols.
Automatically generate unit tests based on code logic or API definitions. This ensures coverage for critical functions, validates expected outputs, and supports CI/CD pipelines for quality assurance.

description: Custom automation developments with no Generative AI.

Automate scrolling actions to navigate through lengthy documents or webpages, enhancing accessibility to complete content.

Analyses the reasons why students pass their internship but do not convert into employees based on internship data from SharePoint-based Excel files to identify cases. The solution cross-references evaluation and status data, classifies exit reasons, and performs sentiment analysis on comments using AI. The output is a consolidated Excel report and a dashboard that provide actionable insights by business unit, location, and study type, supporting data-driven actions to improve student-to-junior conversion rates.
Forecasts future case volumes based on historical data trends.
